title: Crispy Light American Almond Stir-fry
description: A quick, nutty stirfry featuring fresh veggies, toasted almonds and a savory onionsalt glaze, all in one pan and eggfreefriendly.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium‑high heat and add the vegetable oil.
Add the sliced onions and sauté until translucent, about 2–3 minutes.
Add the carrots and bell pepper, stir‑fry for 4–5 minutes until they begin to soften.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan and add the almonds to the center, stir‑frying for 1–2 minutes until toasted.
Return the vegetables to the pan, sprinkle with garlic powder, onion salt, and chili flakes; stir to combine.
Pour in the soy sauce and rice vinegar, stirring to coat everything evenly and cook for another minute.
Add the sesame oil and stir well.
Pour in the cornstarch slurry, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens and coats the vegetables, about 2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Remove from heat and serve immediately over rice or noodles.
